title: Quantum Mechanics Homework 7: Angular Momentum
desc: Proves commutator identities for vector operators using angular momentum algebra.

title: Quantum Mechanics Homework 8: Pauli Matrices
desc: Proofs of Pauli matrix identities and spin operators.

title: Quantum Mechanics Homework 9: Spin States
desc: Calculates probabilities for singlet and triplet states of two electrons, and writes three-electron spin states.

title: Statistical Mechanics Homework 11: Ideal Gas
desc: Derives equation of state, internal energy, entropy, and chemical potential for monatomic ideal gas using canonical ensemble.

title: Quantum Mechanics Homework 3: Step Potential
desc: Analysis of reflection and transmission coefficients for a step potential, verifying probability conservation.

title: Non-Relativistic Limit in QFT
desc: Leading order effects and NR limit of charged scalar particles with massless exchange.

title: Classical Limit of Light Bending
desc: Analyzing phase shifts and classical limit in graviton exchange with photons.

title: Ergosphere Observer Angular Velocity Range
desc: Derives allowed angular velocity range for observers inside ergosphere, approaching horizon.

title: Statistical Mechanics Homework 10: Electron Gas
desc: Calculates Fermi energy, internal energy, and degeneracy pressure for free electron gas at 0K.

title: Interferometer Noise and Quantum Noise
desc: Analysis of noise sources in Advanced LIGO, including quantum, thermal, and technical noise.

title: Debye Model: Partition Function, Energy, Entropy
desc: Derives ln Z, internal energy, and entropy for solids using Debye spectrum in high and low T limits.

title: Photon Field Energy-Momentum Tensor
desc: Derivation of gauge invariant, traceless energy-momentum tensor for photon field.

title: Lorentz Invariance and Optical Theorem Proof
desc: Demonstrates Lorentz invariance of inner product and proves optical theorem via S-matrix unitarity.

title: Dyson Series and On-Shell Factorization
desc: Derivation of Dyson series for transition amplitude with source j.

title: Spinor Helicity for Null Momentum with p0<0
desc: Derives spinor expressions for null momentum with negative energy and shows transformation under LGTs.

title: Vanishing All-Plus Gluon Amplitude
desc: Tree-level 4-point all-plus gluon amplitude vanishes due to forbidden 3-point vertex.

title: Massless Amplitudes and Spinor Helicity
desc: Lecture on massless amplitudes using spinor helicity formalism and Lorentz group decomposition.

title: Bose-Einstein Condensation in 2D and 3D
desc: Proves no BEC in 2D ideal Bose gas; derives critical temperature for 3D harmonic trap.

title: QFT Perspective on Field Theory
desc: Relativistic quantum field theory with Hamiltonian, causality, renormalization, and perturbation theory.

title: Quantum Mechanics Homework 6: Central Force Field
desc: Derivation of kinetic operator and bound state condition in spherical well.

title: Feynman Diagrams for Beginners
desc: Introduction to Feynman diagrams with exercises, covering Dirac equation and QED scattering.

title: Statistical Mechanics Homework 3: Phase Transition Proofs
desc: Derives molar internal energy change and latent heat variation with temperature.

title: 统计力学第6次作业：二维气体速率分布
desc: 推导二维理想气体速度与速率分布，计算平均、最概然及方均根速率。

title: Lecture 6: Chasse_neige and Yang-Mills
desc: Analyzes four-particle test, DoF counting, and Yang-Mills amplitude structure.

title: 引力波的产生、传播与探测
desc: 线性引力近似下推导线性化爱因斯坦方程，分析引力波微扰。

desc: Entropy of Einstein solid and magnetization of crystal with spin-1 atoms.

desc: 证明自由粒子角动量守恒及Feynman-Hellmann定理。

title: On-Shell Factorization in QFT
desc: Analyzing Green functions and poles in scalar field theory with light bulb model.

title: Killing Vectors of Schwarzschild Metric
desc: Proving δ^μ_t and δ^μ_φ are Killing vectors in Schwarzschild spacetime.

title: General Relativity Homework 5 Analysis
desc: Calculate connection and Ricci tensor for a time-dependent metric.
